form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 37-day let-up. First-up after two months ran on from midfield and won by 2 len at this track March 10 over 1400m defeating George Tesoro with 56kg at $14.10. Previously second-up 2nd of 7 at this track on July 1 over 1800m, head behind Love Love Pyro with 57kg at $1.60. Strong winning chance.
